text: *Atisha reported that Allsh's Apostie (may peace be upon him) went out one noming wearing a strped cloak of the black camel's hair tha thers came ERGRRR . A Ho wrappod hitn under &, then came Husin and he wrapped Him under it aong with the other ono (EBBBRD. Then came Fatima and ho took hor under it then came ‘Al and h also fook him under it and then said: Alah only desires to take away any uncleaniiness from you, O peopl of the ‘household, and purify you (thorough purifying) Reference b sk 2424
